english_text: MIND / INTELLIGENCE — Rationale (عقل, spiritual head) | Emotions / Will (قلب, spiritual heart) — SPIRIT borders both
alt_text: Yin-yang style black/white circle titled 'MIND / INTELLIGENCE'. Top half contains a head icon labelled 'Spiritual / Rationale / عقل'; bottom half contains a heart icon labelled 'Spiritual / Emotions / Will / إرادہ / قلب'. The word 'SPIRIT' frames both sides; 'العقل' is written below.
notes: Pedagogical: mind/intelligence is composed of rationale ('aql, the head) and emotions/will (qalb, the heart).
